summary: Agentic text-simulation systems write in sequence, with each item becoming possible context for later steps. That makes uncertainty path-dependent: an early ambiguity can affect later outputs. This paper studies this problem with HawkesLLM, a framework that separates temporal influence modeling from text generation. We represent the cascade as a network whose nodes are text-generating agents. A multivariate Hawkes process models how these nodes activate over time and which earlier node outputs should influence later prompts. A language model then writes each new event from the compact memory selected by this temporal model. We evaluate the framework on a held-out Global Database of Events, Language, and Tone (GDELT) news-cascade case study. The diagnostics track semantic alignment with local held-out references and separate local drift from global drift. In this setting, HawkesLLM improves late-stage semantic alignment under a compact prompt-memory budget.
title: HawkesLLM: Semantic Uncertainty Propagation in Agentic Text Simulation
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, Accepted at the ICML 2026 Workshop on Statistical Frameworks for Uncertainty in Agentic Systems
title_translated: HawkesLLM：智能体文本模拟中的语义不确定性传播
summary_translated: 智能体文本模拟系统按顺序生成文本，每个生成项可能成为后续步骤的上下文。这导致不确定性具有路径依赖性：早期的模糊性会影响后续输出。本文提出HawkesLLM框架，将时间影响建模与文本生成分离。我们将整个过程建模为一个网络，其中节点代表文本生成智能体。多变量Hawkes过程描述这些节点随时间激活的方式，以及哪些先前节点的输出应影响后续提示。随后，语言模型根据该时间模型选择的紧凑记忆来生成每个新事件。我们在一个独立的全球事件、语言与语气数据库（GDELT）新闻级联案例研究中评估该框架。诊断指标追踪与局部独立参考的语义对齐，并区分局部漂移与全局漂移。在此设置下，HawkesLLM在紧凑提示记忆预算下提升了后期语义对齐效果。

summary: How do learners acquire knowledge of what is unacceptable without negative evidence? Construction Grammar proposes statistical preemption: exposure to a conventional form (e.g., "donated the books to the library") preempts structurally possible but unattested alternatives ("*donated the library the books"). We present a computational study that, for the first time, directly dissociates statistical preemption from the competing entrenchment hypothesis in large language models within a single converging design. Across four experiments spanning 120 English verb-construction pairings (dative, causative, locative), we show that (1) LLM surprisal patterns correlate strongly with human acceptability judgments ($r = 0.79$), validated against three independent behavioral datasets; (2) these patterns are driven by competing-form frequency rather than overall verb frequency, confirmed by non-circular partial correlations; (3) preemption sensitivity scales as a power law with model size; and (4) a controlled fine-tuning intervention causally demonstrates that manipulating competing-form frequencies shifts preemption behavior in the predicted direction, with reverse-direction controls ruling out frequency-sensitivity confounds. These results provide converging evidence that neural language models acquire negative linguistic knowledge through distributional competition, the core mechanism posited by Construction Grammar.
title: Do Language Models Know What Not to Say? Causal Evidence for Statistical Preemption in LLMs
comment: Accepted at CoNLL 2026. 21 pages (9 main body + appendices and references); 4 figures, 14 tables
title_translated: 语言模型知道什么不该说吗？关于大语言模型中统计预占的因果证据
summary_translated: 学习者如何在没有负面证据的情况下掌握不可接受内容的知识？构式语法提出统计预占机制：接触常规表达形式（如“把书捐给了图书馆”）会抑制结构上可能但未被使用的替代形式（如“*把图书馆捐了书”）。本研究首次在单一收敛设计中直接区分大语言模型中的统计预占与竞争的固化假设。通过对120个英语动词-构式配对（与格、使役、处所）进行四项实验，我们发现：（1）大语言模型的意外度模式与人类可接受性判断高度相关（r=0.79），并通过三个独立行为数据集验证；（2）这些模式由竞争形式频率驱动，而非整体动词频率，经非循环偏相关确认；（3）预占敏感性随模型规模呈幂律增长；（4）通过受控微调干预，因果证明操纵竞争形式频率可按预测方向改变预占行为，反向控制排除了频率敏感性混淆因素。这些结果提供了有力证据，表明神经语言模型通过分布竞争获得负向语言知识，这是构式语法所提出的机制核心。

summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) enable feature-level mechanistic interpretability and activation steering in large language models (LLMs), but SAE-based language control remains unreliable in multilingual settings: most SAEs are trained on English-only data, and steering layers are chosen heuristically. We address these limitations by advancing a principled, mechanistic account of multilingual language steering with SAEs. First, we show that training SAEs on multilingual data consistently strengthens cross-lingual representations and yields more reliable, quality-preserving language control across layers and model families. Second, we introduce an \emph{a priori} steering layer-selection rule based on the intersection of multilingual alignment and language separability, which predicts effective intervention depths without exhaustive layerwise search. We evaluate our approach on LLaMA-3.1-8B and Gemma-2-9B across machine translation and cross-lingual summarization (CrossSumm), using SpBLEU, ROUGE-L, COMET, and LaSE. Our results show that multilingual SAEs combined with intersection-selected layers stabilize the trade-off between language identification accuracy and generation quality, providing a principled, predictive, representation-level account of multilingual SAE steering.
title: Multilingual Steering by Design: Multilingual Sparse Autoencoders and Principled Layer Selection
comment: Accepted to TrustNLP Workshop at ACL 2026
title_translated: 基于设计的多语言引导：多语言稀疏自编码器与原则性层选择
summary_translated: 稀疏自编码器（SAEs）实现了大语言模型（LLMs）在特征层面的机械可解释性与激活引导，但在多语言环境下，基于SAE的语言控制仍不可靠：大多数SAE仅在纯英文数据上训练，且引导层的选择依赖启发式方法。我们通过推进一种基于原理的、机械化的多语言语言引导方法来解决这些局限。首先，我们证明在多语言数据上训练SAE能持续增强跨语言表示，并在不同层和模型家族中实现更可靠、质量保持良好的语言控制。其次，我们提出一种先验的引导层选择规则，基于多语言对齐与语言可分性的交集，可在无需逐层搜索的情况下预测有效干预深度。我们在LLaMA-3.1-8B和Gemma-2-9B上评估该方法，涵盖机器翻译与跨语言摘要（CrossSumm），使用SpBLEU、ROUGE-L、COMET和LaSE作为指标。结果表明，结合交集选择层的多语言SAE稳定了语言识别准确率与生成质量之间的权衡，提供了一种原则性、可预测、基于表示层面的多语言SAE引导解释。

summary: Intermediate layers of large language models (LLMs) best predict human brain responses to language, one of the most robust findings in computational neurolinguistics, yet why remains mechanistically unexplained. We address this gap by bridging sparse autoencoders (SAEs) from mechanistic interpretability with neural encoding models, decomposing GPT-2 XL and Llama-3.1-8B into 16K-32K interpretable features per layer. A human-validated taxonomy ($κ\geq 0.74$) reveals that semantic features alone recover 94% of peak encoding performance ($r=0.285$), substantially exceeding variance-matched baselines ($p<0.001$, $d=1.31$). Beyond this aggregate dominance, we test a novel cortical topography prediction: five semantic subcategories derived a priori from three independent neuroscience programs should map onto distinct brain regions. A formal convergence test confirms this alignment (Spearman $ρ=0.72$, $p<0.001$; hypergeometric $p=0.007$), demonstrating that SAE-discovered features recapitulate known cortical semantic organization at a granularity inaccessible to prior methods. SAE features further predict human reading times beyond lexical controls ($Δ\mathrm{logLik}=38.4$, $p<0.001$), and an exploratory prediction-error analysis provides preliminary evidence that the brain additionally encodes unexpected semantic content. Results generalize across English, Chinese, and French.
title: Sparse Autoencoders Map Brain-LLM Alignment onto Cortical Semantic Topography
comment: Accepted at CoNLL 2026. 20 pages (9 main + 1 limitations/acknowledgments + 3 references + 7 appendix), 5 figures, 20 tables
title_translated: 稀疏自编码器将脑-大模型对齐映射到皮层语义拓扑
summary_translated: 大语言模型（LLMs）的中间层最能预测人类大脑对语言的反应，这是计算神经语言学中最稳健的发现之一，但其机制尚不明确。我们通过连接机械可解释性中的稀疏自编码器（SAEs）与神经编码模型，填补这一空白，将GPT-2 XL和Llama-3.1-8B分解为每层16K–32K个可解释特征。经过人类验证的分类体系（κ≥0.74）显示，仅语义特征即可恢复94%的峰值编码性能（r=0.285），显著优于方差匹配基线（p<0.001，d=1.31）。除了整体主导性外，我们还测试了一个新颖的皮层拓扑预测：从三个独立神经科学项目中先验推导出的五个语义子类别应映射到不同的大脑区域。正式收敛检验证实了这种对齐（Spearman ρ=0.72，p<0.001；超几何 p=0.007），表明SAE发现的特征重现了已知的皮层语义组织结构，其粒度远超以往方法。此外，SAE特征还能在控制词汇因素后预测人类阅读时间（ΔlogLik=38.4，p<0.001），探索性预测误差分析也初步揭示大脑还编码了意外的语义内容。结果在英语、中文和法语中均具泛化性。

summary: Brain-LLM alignment is well established in English, yet the brain's language network is neuroanatomically universal across languages. Does alignment also generalize cross-linguistically, and what governs the variation? We test this using fMRI data from 112 participants across English, Chinese, and French (the Le Petit Prince corpus) and seven LLMs spanning English-dominant, Chinese-dominant, and multilingual architectures. Our central finding is that training-language dominance, not an inherent property of English, drives the alignment pattern: a Chinese-dominant model (Baichuan2-7B), architecture-matched to LLaMA-2-7B, reverses the gradient entirely, aligning best with Chinese brains and worst with English. Beyond training dominance, formal typological distance independently covaries with alignment degradation, syntax-associated brain regions (IFG) show $2.3\times$ steeper typological gradients than lexico-semantic regions (PTL), and tokenization fertility accounts for $\sim$60% of a cross-linguistic shift in optimal encoding layer. These results reveal that the apparent "English advantage" in brain-LLM alignment is an artifact of training data composition, while the remaining variation reflects genuine typological structure concentrated in syntactic processing.
title: Brain-LLM Alignment Tracks Training Data, Not Typology
comment: Accepted to CoNLL 2026. 9 pages main content + 4 pages references + 6 pages appendix; 4 figures, 13 tables
title_translated: 脑-大模型对齐反映训练数据，而非语言类型
summary_translated: 脑-大模型对齐在英语中已有充分确立，但大脑的语言网络在神经解剖学上对所有语言都是普遍的。这种对齐是否跨语言泛化，其变化由什么决定？我们使用来自112名参与者在英语、中文和法语（《小王子》语料库）上的fMRI数据，以及七种跨越英语主导、中文主导和多语言架构的大语言模型进行测试。核心发现是：训练语言主导性，而非英语本身的固有属性，决定了对齐模式：一个中文主导的模型（Baichuan2-7B），在架构上与LLaMA-2-7B匹配，完全逆转了梯度，与中文大脑对齐最好，与英语大脑对齐最差。除训练主导性外，形式类型距离也独立地与对齐退化相关；语法相关脑区（IFG）的类型梯度比词汇语义区域（PTL）陡峭2.3倍；分词丰度解释了约60%的跨语言最优编码层变化。这些结果揭示，脑-大模型对齐中看似“英语优势”实为训练数据构成的产物，而剩余变异则反映了真实类型学结构，集中在句法处理区域。

summary: Characteristic linguistic behaviors associated with Social Language Disorder (SLD) in autism spectrum disorder, including echoic repetition, pronoun displacement, and stereotyped media quoting, are largely absent from spontaneous conversation and only emerge under specific conversational conditions. In structured clinical assessments, this latency means that questioning strategy selection is a critical yet underappreciated determinant of how much diagnostic information a conversation yields. Whether large language models (LLMs) can be guided to proactively select questioning strategies that systematically surface these latent traits remains largely unexplored. Here we present TPA (Think, Plan, Ask), a proactive multi-agent dialogue framework applied to the language assessment component of the Autism Diagnostic Observation Schedule Module 4 (ADOS-2), in which a doctor agent explicitly reasons about which traits remain unobserved before selecting a clinically grounded strategy and generating a targeted question. A patient agent grounded in real ADOS-2 clinical data enables reproducible evaluation without real patient participation, validated across three independent experiments confirming adequate fidelity to real patient language. Evaluated on 484 episodes from 35 patients, TPA outperforms six competitive dialogue planning baselines across all primary metrics, achieving 82.1% SLD trait coverage, 16.6% higher than automated replay of real clinical dialogues conducted by trained clinicians (65.5%), with substantially greater per-turn diagnostic efficiency (AUCC: 0.628 vs. 0.458, absolute gain +0.170). These results demonstrate that proactive questioning strategy selection substantially improves the efficiency of automated SLD trait assessment, with direct implications for scalable AI-assisted clinical screening.
title: A Proactive Multi-Agent Dialogue Framework for Assessing Social Language Disorder Traits in Autism
title_translated: 一种主动的多智能体对话框架，用于评估自闭症患者的社交语言障碍特征
summary_translated: 自闭症谱系障碍中与社交语言障碍（SLD）相关的典型语言行为，包括回声式重复、代词错位和刻板化媒体引用，在自发对话中大多缺失，仅在特定对话条件下才会显现。在结构化临床评估中，这种延迟意味着提问策略的选择是决定对话能产生多少诊断信息的关键因素，但这一因素却未得到足够重视。大型语言模型（LLMs）是否能够被引导以主动选择系统性地揭示这些潜在特征的提问策略，仍基本未被探索。本文提出TPA（思考、规划、提问）框架，这是一种应用于自闭症诊断观察量表模块4（ADOS-2）语言评估部分的主动多智能体对话框架。其中，医生智能体在选择临床基础策略并生成针对性问题前，会明确推理哪些特征尚未被观察到。基于真实ADOS-2临床数据的患者智能体使得无需真实患者参与即可实现可复现的评估，并通过三次独立实验验证了其对真实患者语言的良好保真度。在35名患者共484个对话回合上的评估显示，TPA在所有主要指标上均优于六种竞争性对话规划基线，达到82.1%的SLD特征覆盖率，比由训练有素的临床医生进行的自动化真实对话重播高出16.6%（65.5%），且每轮对话的诊断效率显著提升（AUCC：0.628 vs. 0.458，绝对提升+0.170）。结果表明，主动提问策略选择显著提升了自动化SLD特征评估的效率，对可扩展的AI辅助临床筛查具有直接意义。

summary: Fill-in-the-middle (FIM) is a pretraining objective widely used to equip causal language models with infilling ability, yet its effect on verbatim memorization remains underexplored. We study the memorization dynamics of FIM in a controlled setting by pretraining matched Llama 3.2 models with FIM and standard left-to-right (LTR) objectives on a FineWeb-Gutenberg corpus containing repeated Gutenberg excerpts. With prefix-based probes, FIM more often recovers short or partially matching spans, while LTR more often assigns high confidence to long exact continuations. We observe that verbatim extraction under FIM-training grows approximately linearly with repetitions over the tested range. Evaluating native FIM-format probes reveals that suffix context is not sufficient: verbatim recall under FIM-training remains strongly anchored in prefix context. Our results also show that evaluating only one span length or probing format can miss important nuances in memorization behavior.
title: Memorization Dynamics of Fill-in-the-Middle Pretraining
comment: MemFM @ ICML 2026
title_translated: 填空中间预训练的记忆动态研究
summary_translated: 填空中间（FIM）是一种广泛用于赋予因果语言模型填空能力的预训练目标，但其对原文记忆的影响仍缺乏深入研究。我们在受控环境中研究了FIM在记忆动态方面的表现，通过在包含重复古腾堡摘录的FineWeb-Gutenberg语料库上，对匹配的Llama 3.2模型分别采用FIM和标准左到右（LTR）目标进行预训练。通过前缀探测发现，FIM更倾向于恢复短或部分匹配的片段，而LTR则更常对长的精确延续赋予高置信度。我们观察到，在测试范围内，FIM训练下的原文提取随重复次数近似线性增长。评估原生FIM格式探测结果表明，仅靠后缀上下文不足以支持记忆：FIM训练下的原文回忆仍强烈依赖于前缀上下文。我们的研究还显示，仅评估单一跨度长度或探测格式可能会忽略记忆行为中的重要细节。

summary: Katharevousa Greek remains poorly served by contemporary NLP pipelines despite its importance for legal, administrative, and parliamentary archives. We present a reproducible workflow for building and evaluating a Universal Dependencies-style parsing resource for Katharevousa parliamentary questions from Greece's early post-junta period. The pipeline links OCR-aware reconstruction, schema-constrained LLM-assisted annotation, automatic validation, deterministic CoNLL-U snapshotting, fixed-split evaluation, and model-family comparison. The frozen automatically validated reference set contains 1{,}697 sentences, split into 1{,}357 training sentences and 340 held-out test sentences. We compare off-the-shelf Greek and Ancient Greek parsers, a feature-based parser, mBERT, XLM-R, and custom Stanza training under the same scoring protocol. Off-the-shelf systems show substantial register mismatch: the strongest external baseline, spaCy Greek, reaches 0.4183 LAS. The best structural parser, an XLM-R model, reaches 0.8893 UPOS accuracy, 0.7250 dependency-relation F1, 0.6098 UAS, and 0.5162 LAS, an absolute LAS gain of 0.0980 over the best external baseline. The feature-based model remains competitive for UPOS and relation labeling, indicating that transparent lexical-context features still matter at this data scale. Beyond scores, the paper contributes an auditable methodology for turning difficult historical parliamentary OCR into reusable syntactic NLP infrastructure. The entire pipeline -- code, schema, frozen reference annotations, fixed train/test split, and per-model benchmark reports -- is released as an open-access companion to this paper.
title: A Reproducible Universal Dependencies-Style Pipeline for Katharevousa Greek Parliamentary Text
comment: 12 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables; companion to the kathnlp open-source release at this https URL
title_translated: 面向希腊语议会文本的可复现通用依存句法风格流水线
summary_translated: 尽管卡塔雷沃萨希腊语在法律、行政和议会档案中具有重要意义，但当前自然语言处理（NLP）流水线对其支持仍然不足。本文提出了一套可复现的工作流程，用于构建和评估希腊早期后军政府时期议会问答的通用依存句法风格解析资源。该流水线整合了OCR感知重建、基于模式约束的LLM辅助标注、自动验证、确定性CoNLL-U快照生成、固定分割评估以及模型族比较。冻结的自动验证参考集包含1,697个句子，分为1,357个训练句和340个保留测试句。我们对比了现成的希腊语和古希腊语解析器、基于特征的解析器、mBERT、XLM-R以及在同一评分协议下定制的Stanza训练模型。现成系统表现出显著的语域不匹配：最强的外部基线spaCy希腊语达到0.4183的LAS。最佳结构化解析器（XLM-R模型）达到0.8893的UPOS准确率、0.7250的依存关系F1、0.6098的UAS和0.5162的LAS，相比最佳外部基线绝对提升0.0980。基于特征的模型在UPOS和关系标注方面仍具竞争力，表明在此数据规模下透明的词汇-上下文特征依然重要。除了性能分数，本文还贡献了一种可审计的方法论，将困难的历史议会OCR转化为可复用的句法NLP基础设施。整个流水线——代码、模式、冻结参考标注、固定训练/测试划分及各模型基准报告——作为本文的开放获取配套发布。

summary: We ask whether large language models (LLMs) treat queries about religious conversion symmetrically. The answer is no. When asked for advice on hypothetical faith transitions from one religion to another, then asked the reversed question, models exhibited consistent asymmetries, favoring some religions while subtly discouraging conversion to others. On average Catholic, Bahá'í, and Sikh religions were broadly favored (high support for joining, low support for leaving), while Atheists, Agnostics, and Jehovah's Witnesses were primarily disfavored. Patterns varied by model size and model provider, with Grok 4.20 exhibiting the strongest asymmetries.   We tested 20 commercial and open-source language models across 182 religion pairings using a human-verified LLM-as-a-judge framework. Each model was probed via interactions with a simulated user asking for advice on a potential faith conversion. Models tended to use more encouraging language for some faith transitions over others; these patterns were systematically repeatable across multiple trials.   All LLMs tested exhibited reproducible asymmetry, though the pattern of preferences differed for each. Overall preferences persist across multiple question phrasings and variations in the religious pairing dataset. Taken together, these results suggest that asymmetry is a robust property of model behavior rather than an artifact of how the models' answers were scored. It is important to consider that any imbalances deployed and reproduced en masse can have real-world implications.
title: When AI Takes Sides on Questions of Faith: Persistent Asymmetries in AI-Mediated Faith Guidance
comment: 29 pages, 16 figures
title_translated: 当AI在信仰问题上站队时：AI中介信仰指导中的持续不对称性
summary_translated: 我们探讨大型语言模型（LLMs）是否对宗教皈依问题持对称态度。答案是否定的。当被询问从一个宗教转向另一个宗教的假设建议时，再反向提问，模型表现出一致的不对称性，倾向于某些宗教，同时微妙地 discouraging 转向其他宗教。总体而言，天主教、巴哈伊教和锡克教普遍受到青睐（加入支持高，离开支持低），而无神论者、不可知论者和耶和华见证人则主要受到贬低。这种模式随模型大小和提供商不同而变化，Grok 4.20表现出最强的不对称性。我们使用人类验证的LLM作为裁判框架，在182个宗教配对中测试了20个商业和开源语言模型。每个模型通过与模拟用户互动进行探测，用户寻求关于潜在宗教皈依的建议。模型在某些宗教转变中使用更具鼓励性的语言，这些模式在多次试验中系统性重复出现。所有测试的LLM均表现出可复现的不对称性，尽管偏好模式各不相同。整体偏好在多种问题表述和宗教配对数据集变化下依然持续存在。综合来看，这些结果表明不对称性是模型行为的一个稳健属性，而非评分方式的产物。必须认识到，任何大规模部署和复制的不平衡都可能带来现实世界的影响。

summary: Employees often struggle to identify ``who knows what,'' leading to organizational productivity losses. We investigate whether Large Language Models (LLMs) can infer individual domain knowledge directly from long-term Slack logs. Analyzing 27,188 messages from 43 users, we evaluated seven models (including Gemini, Claude, and GPT families) by comparing their zero-shot estimates against self-reported skill ratings from 27 participants. Gemini 2.5 Flash achieved the lowest error (MAE 21.13%), while GPT models showed significantly larger discrepancies. Notably, estimation accuracy depended only weakly on message volume, indicating that more text alone does not guarantee better inference. These findings demonstrate the feasibility and current limits of automated expertise mapping, highlighting the need for privacy-preserving deployments and richer, structure-aware representations of human knowledge.
title: Can AI Guess What You Know? Performance Comparison of Large Language Models for Human Domain Knowledge Estimation From Communication Logs
title_translated: AI能否猜出你知道什么？基于通信日志的大语言模型人类领域知识估计性能比较
summary_translated: 员工常常难以识别“谁了解什么”，导致组织生产力损失。我们研究大型语言模型（LLMs）是否能直接从长期Slack日志中推断个人领域知识。通过对43名用户的27,188条消息进行分析，我们通过将七种模型（包括Gemini、Claude和GPT系列）的零样本估计与27名参与者自报技能评分进行对比，评估其性能。Gemini 2.5 Flash取得最低误差（MAE 21.13%），而GPT系列模型显示出显著更大的偏差。值得注意的是，估计准确性仅与消息量弱相关，表明仅增加文本量并不能保证更好的推断效果。这些发现展示了自动化专家映射的可行性及其当前局限，强调了隐私保护部署以及更丰富、结构感知的人类知识表示的必要性。

summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) are optimized to produce distributionally plausible continuations rather than to explicitly verify whether generated propositions are entailed by source documents. This inductive bias enables generalization, but it does not encode whether responses are grounded with respect to a reference. These issues limit the use of LLMs in domains where strict factual correctness is crucial, such as clinical decision support. Existing hallucination detection approaches improve factuality through retrieval augmentation, self-consistency, or claim verification, but generally do not learn directly over alignment topology. To leverage alignment topology as an inductive bias, we construct aligned bipartite graphs between reference information and LLM outputs and train a graph neural network (GNN) to model alignment structure using message passing. The method achieves state-of-the-art results on four diverse hallucination and question-answering datasets, outperforming all compared methods, including foundational LLMs such as GPT-4o.
title: Graph Alignment Topology as an Inductive Bias for Grounding Detection
title_translated: 图对齐拓扑作为接地检测的归纳偏置
summary_translated: 大型语言模型（LLMs）被优化为生成在分布上合理的延续，而非显式验证生成命题是否由源文档蕴含。这种归纳偏置促进了泛化能力，但并未编码响应是否相对于参考文本具有依据。这些问题限制了LLMs在临床决策支持等对事实正确性要求严格领域的应用。现有的幻觉检测方法通过检索增强、自一致性或声明验证来提升事实性，但通常不直接学习对齐拓扑。为利用对齐拓扑作为归纳偏置，我们构建了参考信息与LLM输出之间的对齐二分图，并训练图神经网络（GNN）通过消息传递来建模对齐结构。该方法在四个多样化的幻觉和问答数据集上达到领先水平，优于所有对比方法，包括GPT-4o等基础LLM。

summary: We aim to improve the reasoning capabilities of diffusion language models (DLMs). While SFT is a popular post-training recipe for autoregressive models, its use in DLMs faces challenges and can even hurt performance, though the underlying causes remain understudied. Our analysis reveals that vanilla SFT overlooks learnability, namely what and when tokens are learned. Specifically, rare tokens are difficult to learn when most of the input is masked, whereas it is straightforward and thus of little value to learn common tokens when most of the input is unmasked. Motivated by our analysis, we propose LIFT, an efficient SFT-based post-training algorithm for DLMs. LIFT learns easy tokens when most of the input is masked and hard tokens when more context is available, thus aligning the training with the information available at different diffusion time steps. Our results show that LIFT outperforms existing SFT baselines across six reasoning benchmarks, achieving up to a 3x relative gain on AIME'24 and AIME'25. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/divelab/LIFT.
title: Learnability-Informed Fine-Tuning of Diffusion Language Models
title_translated: 基于可学习性的扩散语言模型微调
summary_translated: 我们旨在提升扩散语言模型（DLMs）的推理能力。尽管监督微调（SFT）是自回归模型流行的后训练方法，但在DLMs中的应用面临挑战，甚至可能损害性能，而其根本原因尚未得到充分研究。我们的分析表明，原始SFT忽略了可学习性，即何时以及哪些标记可以被学习。具体而言，当大部分输入被掩码时，稀有标记难以学习；而当大部分输入未被掩码时，常见标记的学习则过于简单，价值较低。受此分析启发，我们提出了LIFT——一种高效的基于SFT的DLM后训练算法。LIFT在输入大部分被掩码时学习简单标记，在更多上下文可用时学习困难标记，从而将训练与不同扩散时间步的信息可用性相匹配。实验结果表明，LIFT在六个推理基准测试中均优于现有SFT基线，在AIME'24和AIME'25上相对提升最高达3倍。代码已公开于https://github.com/divelab/LIFT。

summary: Inference-time scaling can reduce errors in structured query generation, but methods to allocate the compute for query code generation remains underexplored. We study Text2Cypher, where language models generate Cypher queries that execute against property graph databases. Non-executable queries constitute a distinct syntactic failure separate from semantic inaccuracy: a syntax error triggers a system-generated error message from the database. These error messages are typically discarded at inference time rather than leveraged through in-context learning (ICL). We compare two inference methods: Independent Scaling (IS), which performs memoryless resampling, and Reflection-Augmented Scaling (RAS), which conditions each new attempt on prior execution feedback via ICL. Across three Neo4j datasets and five code-specialized language models, RAS reduces the Query Execution Error Rate by 41--50% at n{=}5, outperforming IS at 32--38%. Execution errors are not merely failures to discard but actionable feedback, and structuring inference-time compute around them is a more efficient path to executability than scaling independent samples.
title: RAS: Reflection-Augmented Scaling with In-Context Learning for Executable Cypher Query Generation
title_translated: RAS：基于上下文学习的反思增强缩放用于可执行Cypher查询生成
summary_translated: 推理时的缩放可以减少结构化查询生成中的错误，但如何分配计算资源用于查询代码生成仍缺乏探索。我们研究Text2Cypher任务，即语言模型生成针对属性图数据库执行的Cypher查询。不可执行查询构成一种独立于语义不准确的语法失败：语法错误会触发数据库生成的系统错误消息。这些错误消息通常在推理时被丢弃，而非通过上下文学习（ICL）加以利用。我们比较两种推理方法：无记忆重采样的独立缩放（IS），以及基于ICL利用先前执行反馈来调整每次新尝试的反思增强缩放（RAS）。在三个Neo4j数据集和五个专用于代码的语言模型上，RAS在n=5时将查询执行错误率降低了41%–50%，优于IS的32%–38%。执行错误不仅是失败，更是可操作的反馈，围绕这些反馈组织推理时计算资源，比独立样本缩放更高效地实现可执行性。

summary: As large language model (LLM)-based agents increasingly participate in online discourse, red-teaming their capacity to support political influence campaigns is critical for information integrity. In pursuit of this goal, we focus on locally deployed open-source LLMs, as opposed to frontier API-only models, given their superior alignment with the operational constraints of privacy-conscious malicious actors deployed in social media environments. We introduce an empirical red-teaming framework for measuring LLM Overton Windows (OWs), defined as the range of political opinions a model can reliably express on controversial topics, and for quantifying how simple natural-language jailbreaks expand that range. We evaluate more than 30 LLMs spanning 10 model families and five countries of origin. We find systematic asymmetries in political expressivity: open-source LLMs are typically more willing to generate left-leaning social media content, OWs tend to contract inversely to model size, and regional differences are substantial despite uneven representation in the open-source ecosystem. Jailbreak potency also varies sharply across model families, motivating a workflow for identifying effective combinations of jailbreak techniques. Taken together, our results establish a practical framework for auditing the political steerability of open-source LLMs and for helping future researchers design stronger countermeasures against LLM-enabled influence campaigns.
title: How Far Will They Go? Red-Teaming Online Influence with Large Language Models
comment: 30 pages, 8 figures, submitted to COLM 2026
title_translated: 它们能走多远？使用大语言模型对在线影响力进行红队测试
summary_translated: 随着基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体越来越多地参与在线话语，对其支持政治影响力活动的能力进行红队测试对于保障信息完整性至关重要。为此，我们聚焦于本地部署的开源LLM，而非仅限API的前沿模型，因为它们更符合隐私敏感恶意行为者在社交媒体环境中运行的实际约束。我们提出一个实证红队测试框架，用于衡量LLM的奥顿窗口（OWs），即模型在争议话题上可靠表达的政治观点范围，并量化简单的自然语言越狱技术如何扩展这一范围。我们评估了超过30个LLM，涵盖10个模型家族和五个国家来源。发现政治表达存在系统性不对称：开源LLM通常更愿意生成偏向左翼的社交媒体内容；奥顿窗口随模型规模增大而反向收缩；尽管开源生态中代表性不均，区域差异仍然显著。越狱效果在不同模型家族间差异明显，这促使我们设计出识别有效越狱技术组合的工作流程。总体而言，我们的研究建立了一个实用框架，用于审计开源LLM的政治可引导性，并帮助未来研究人员设计更强的对抗LLM驱动影响力活动的对策。

summary: Text-to-SQL converts natural language questions into executable SQL queries, enabling non-technical users to access relational databases for analytics and intelligent data services. In real-world scenarios, performance is often constrained by low-resource settings, where high-quality annotated \texttt{<question, SQL>} pairs are scarce, particularly for domain-specific databases. Additional challenges include opaque schema definitions, abbreviations, and implicit business logic that are not explicitly encoded in the schema. Existing data synthesis and prompting techniques improve coverage but often fail to produce task-specific, semantically grounded examples aligned with database constraints. To address these challenges, we propose a knowledge-aware Text-to-SQL framework that constructs task-specific knowledge base including schema semantics, abbreviations, business logic, and query patterns, and injects them into both training and inference. This framework generates diverse, contextually grounded synthetic training data and enhances inference through targeted knowledge retrieval. Experiments on seven benchmarks, covering both general and domain-specific datasets, demonstrate that our approach substantially improves the performance of open-source and closed-source large language models in Text-to-SQL tasks, especially in low-resource domain-specific settings, enhancing generalization, robustness, and adaptability.
title: Knowledge Distillation for Low-Resource Open-source Text-to-SQL Model
comment: 17ages, 5 figures
title_translated: 面向低资源开源文本到SQL模型的知识蒸馏
summary_translated: 文本到SQL将自然语言问题转换为可执行的SQL查询，使非技术人员能够访问关系型数据库以进行分析和智能数据服务。在真实场景中，性能常受限于低资源环境，其中高质量的<问题, SQL>标注对稀缺，尤其在特定领域数据库中更为突出。额外挑战包括模糊的模式定义、缩写以及未在模式中显式编码的隐含业务逻辑。现有数据合成和提示技术虽提升了覆盖度，但往往无法生成与数据库约束一致的任务特定、语义 grounded 的示例。为应对这些挑战，我们提出一种知识感知的文本到SQL框架，构建包含模式语义、缩写、业务逻辑和查询模式的任务特定知识库，并将其注入训练和推理过程。该框架生成多样化、上下文相关的合成训练数据，并通过针对性知识检索增强推理。在七个基准测试上的实验表明，我们的方法显著提升了开源和闭源大语言模型在文本到SQL任务中的表现，尤其是在低资源特定领域设置下，增强了泛化性、鲁棒性和适应性。

summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems depend critically on document chunking quality for retrieving relevant context. Fixed chunking segments documents into uniform units irrespective of semantics or user intent, producing a precision-recall trade-off unresolvable by tuning chunk size alone. Semantic and agentic methods partially address these limitations but do not integrate user queries at the chunking stage. We present Query-Adaptive Semantic Chunking (QASC), which dynamically constructs chunks by integrating queries into segmentation through three mechanisms: cosine similarity scoring between sentence and query embeddings to identify seed sentences, contextual window expansion around seeds to preserve coherence, and chunk-level score aggregation to ensure holistic relevance. We evaluate QASC on 100 technical documents across 200 queries spanning four types, comparing against fixed chunking at five granularities, recursive splitting, semantic chunking, and agentic chunking. QASC achieves an F1-score of 0.85, a relative improvement of 18-27% over fixed chunking and 8-12% over semantic and agentic alternatives. Ablation studies confirm each component contributes meaningfully. Human evaluation by three annotators (Cohen kappa = 0.82) corroborates that QASC produces more relevant and coherent chunks than existing methods.
title: Query-Adaptive Semantic Chunking for Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Dynamic Strategy with Contextual Window Expansion
title_translated: 查询自适应语义分块用于检索增强生成：一种结合上下文窗口扩展的动态策略
summary_translated: 检索增强生成（RAG）系统在获取相关上下文方面严重依赖文档分块的质量。固定分块将文档划分为统一单元，不考虑语义或用户意图，导致精度与召回率之间的权衡无法仅通过调整分块大小解决。语义和代理方法部分缓解了这些局限，但未在分块阶段整合用户查询。我们提出查询自适应语义分块（QASC），通过三种机制动态构建分块：利用句子与查询嵌入之间的余弦相似度评分识别种子句，围绕种子句进行上下文窗口扩展以保持连贯性，以及分块级评分聚合以确保整体相关性。我们在200个查询覆盖四种类型、共100份技术文档上评估QASC，对比了五种粒度的固定分块、递归分割、语义分块和代理分块。QASC取得0.85的F1分数，相对于固定分块提升18-27%，相对于语义和代理方法提升8-12%。消融实验确认各组件均有显著贡献。三位标注员的人工评估（Cohen kappa = 0.82）证实QASC生成的分块比现有方法更具相关性和连贯性。

summary: This survey provides a comprehensive catalog of publicly available text and speech resources for two West African languages: Hausa, an Afroasiatic language with approximately 80-100 million speakers, and Fongbe, a Niger-Congo language spoken by approximately 2 million people in Benin. These languages represent contrasting cases on the resource availability spectrum. We address the question: \textit{What is the current state of publicly available NLP resources for Hausa and Fongbe, and what gaps remain?} Through systematic search of academic repositories, data platforms, and web sources, we catalog parallel corpora, monolingual text collections, speech datasets, pre-trained models, and evaluation benchmarks. For each resource, we document size, domain coverage, format, licensing, and accessibility. Our findings reveal that Hausa benefits from broader text resource diversity across news, encyclopedic, and educational domains. Fongbe, while having more limited text resources, has been the focus of recent academic speech data collection initiatives. Both languages are represented in Masakhane benchmarks for NER and POS tagging. We provide task-specific recommendations and identify priority gaps including domain-diverse Fongbe text and dedicated Hausa speech corpora.
title: A Survey of Text and Speech Resources for Hausa and Fongbe: Availability, Quality, and Gaps for NLP Development
comment: 8 pages, 7 tables; survey paper; to appear in IEEE SDS 2026
title_translated: 豪萨语与丰贝语文本与语音资源综述：可用性、质量及NLP发展中的差距
summary_translated: 本综述全面梳理了两种西非语言——豪萨语（非洲亚细亚语系，约8000万至1亿使用者）和丰贝语（尼日尔-刚果语系，约200万人使用于贝宁）——公开可用的文本与语音资源。这两种语言代表了资源可用性谱系上的两个极端。本文回答的问题是：当前豪萨语与丰贝语的公开NLP资源状况如何？尚存哪些空白？通过系统搜索学术数据库、数据平台和网络资源，我们整理了平行语料库、单语文本集合、语音数据集、预训练模型和评估基准。对每项资源，记录其规模、领域覆盖、格式、许可协议和可访问性。研究发现，豪萨语在新闻、百科和教育等领域拥有更丰富的文本资源多样性；丰贝语虽文本资源有限，但近年来已开展学术语音数据采集工作。两种语言均被纳入Masakhane的NER和词性标注基准。我们提供任务特定建议，并指出优先填补的空白，包括领域多样化的丰贝语文本和专用的豪萨语音语料库。

summary: Quantifying the deceptive potential of Large Language Models (LLMs) is critical for AI safety, yet difficult to achieve in uncontrolled environments. This work investigates the reasoning, persuasion, and deceptive capabilities of LLMs within the social deduction game Secret Hitler. I introduce an open-source framework and novel metrics to measure performance: Role Identification Accuracy, Deception Retention Rate, and Game State Impact Rate. By benchmarking models against rule-based algorithms and human games, I identify a gap between conversational ability and strategic depth. The study also analyzes the impact of reasoning-enhancement techniques on win rates and strategic reasoning. Neither Chain-of-Thought prompting nor internal memory bring improvements in performance, with up to 23.2% worse win rates for fascist roles. While rule-based agents align with expert human voting decisions 86.7% of the time, models like Llama 3.1 70B achieve only a 59.7% accuracy. Models playing as Fascists consistently yield negative impact scores and fail to sustain deception, resulting in roughly 40% shorter games compared to humans. These findings suggest that current architectures remain ineffective at complex, multi-turn manipulation. As capabilities advance, detecting when models begin to master these deceptive behaviors is crucial. The developed framework serves as a reproducible testbed for future alignment research.
title: Evaluating Large Language Models in a Complex Hidden Role Game
comment: Master's thesis, University of Göttingen
title_translated: 在复杂隐藏角色游戏中评估大型语言模型
summary_translated: 量化大型语言模型（LLMs）的欺骗潜力对于AI安全至关重要，但在非受控环境中难以实现。本研究探讨了LLMs在社交推断游戏《秘密希特勒》中的推理、说服与欺骗能力。我引入一个开源框架和新型度量标准来衡量性能：角色识别准确率、欺骗维持率和游戏状态影响率。通过与基于规则的算法及人类对局进行基准测试，发现对话能力与战略深度之间存在差距。研究还分析了增强推理技术对胜率和战略推理的影响。无论是链式思维提示还是内部记忆，均未带来性能提升，甚至使法西斯角色的胜率下降高达23.2%。尽管基于规则的代理在86.7%的情况下与专家人类投票一致，但Llama 3.1 70B等模型仅达到59.7%的准确率。扮演法西斯的角色模型始终产生负向影响得分且无法持续欺骗，导致游戏时长平均比人类短40%。这些发现表明，当前架构在复杂多轮操纵任务中仍无效。随着能力提升，检测模型何时开始掌握此类欺骗行为至关重要。所开发的框架为未来对齐研究提供了可复现的测试平台。

summary: Agent skills today are hand-crafted, generated one-shot, or evolved through loosely controlled self-revision, none of which behaves like a deep-learning optimizer for the skill, and none of which reliably improves over its starting point under feedback. We argue the skill should instead be trained as the external state of a frozen agent, with the same discipline that makes weight-space optimization reproducible. SkillOpt is, to our knowledge, the first systematic controllable text-space optimizer for agent skills: a separate optimizer model turns scored rollouts into bounded add/delete/replace edits on a single skill document, and an edit is accepted only when it strictly improves a held-out validation score. A textual learning-rate budget, rejected-edit buffer, and epoch-wise slow/meta update make skill training stable while adding zero inference-time model calls at deployment. Across six benchmarks, seven target models, and three execution harnesses (direct chat, Codex, Claude Code), SkillOpt is best or tied on all 52 evaluated (model, benchmark, harness) cells and beats every per-cell competitor among human, one-shot LLM, Trace2Skill, TextGrad, GEPA, and EvoSkill skills. On GPT-5.5 it lifts the average no-skill accuracy by +23.5 points in direct chat, by +24.8 inside the Codex agentic loop, and by +19.1 inside Claude Code. Transfer experiments further show that optimized skill artifacts retain value when moved across model scales, between Codex and Claude Code execution environments, and to a nearby math benchmark without further optimization.
title: SkillOpt: Executive Strategy for Self-Evolving Agent Skills
comment: 27 pages, 4 figures, 6 tables
title_translated: SkillOpt：自我演进智能体技能的执行策略
summary_translated: 当前智能体技能通常为手工设计、一次性生成或通过松散控制的自我修订演化，均不具备像深度学习优化器那样对技能进行系统优化的行为，也未能在反馈下可靠地优于初始状态。我们认为，技能应作为冻结智能体的外部状态进行训练，遵循使权重空间优化可复现的严谨原则。据我们所知，SkillOpt是首个系统化可控的文本空间智能体技能优化器：一个独立的优化器模型将评分后的回放结果转化为对单一技能文档的有界增删改操作，且仅当验证分数严格提升时才接受该编辑。通过文本学习率预算、拒绝编辑缓冲区和逐轮缓慢/元更新机制，SkillOpt在部署时零增加推理时间模型调用的前提下实现了稳定训练。在六个基准、七种目标模型和三种执行环境（直接聊天、Codex、Claude Code）中，SkillOpt在全部52个（模型、基准、环境）组合中表现最佳或并列最优，并击败所有单个单元的竞争对手（包括人类、一次性LLM、Trace2Skill、TextGrad、GEPA、EvoSkill）。在GPT-5.5上，它分别在直接聊天中将无技能平均准确率提升+23.5分，在Codex智能体循环中提升+24.8分，在Claude Code中提升+19.1分。迁移实验进一步表明，经过优化的技能成果在跨模型规模、跨Codex与Claude Code执行环境，以及迁移到邻近数学基准时仍保持价值，无需额外优化。

summary: Multimodal Large Language Models have advanced visual reasoning, yet a purely textual chain of thought remains a bottleneck for questions that require fine-grained focus or view transformations. The ''think with images'' paradigm narrows this gap, but existing approaches are either constrained by fixed predefined toolkits or produce noisy intermediate images from unified multimodal methods. We pursue a third option: using a dedicated image editing model and decouple it with an understanding model. However, off-the-shelf image editors fail as reasoning assistants with two complementary gaps: a language-side gap, where editors trained as passive instruction-followers cannot map an abstract question to an appropriate visual transformation, and a generation-side gap, where edit correctness degrades as reasoning depth grows. Guided by this analysis, we introduce ETCHR (Editing To Clarify and Harness Reasoning), a question-conditioned, reasoning-aware image editor decoupled from the downstream understanding model and trained with a two-stage recipe targeted at the two gaps: Reasoning Imitation via supervised fine-tuning on edit trajectories, followed by Reasoning Enhancement with VLM-derived rewards for edit correctness and downstream reasoning accuracy. Since the editor is decoupled, ETCHR plugs into different open- and closed-source MLLMs in a training-free manner. Across five task families (fine-grained perception, chart understanding, logic reasoning, jigsaw restoration, and 3D understanding), ETCHR raises average Pass@1 from 55.95 to 60.77 (+4.82) with Qwen3-VL-8B, from 65.08 to 70.55 (+5.47) with Gemini-3.1-Flash-Lite, and from 76.55 to 81.16 (+4.61) with the 1T-parameter MoE model Kimi K2.5.
title: ETCHR: Editing To Clarify and Harness Reasoning
comment: Code, model and data are open-sourced at this https URL
title_translated: ETCHR：编辑以澄清并激发推理
summary_translated: 多模态大语言模型在视觉推理方面取得了进展，但纯文本思维链仍是需要精细聚焦或视角变换问题的瓶颈。'借助图像思考'范式缩小了这一差距，但现有方法要么受限于固定的预定义工具包，要么由统一多模态方法生成噪声中间图像。我们探索第三种路径：使用专用图像编辑模型，并将其与理解模型解耦。然而，现成的图像编辑器在作为推理助手时存在两个互补性缺陷：语言侧缺陷——作为被动指令跟随者训练的编辑器无法将抽象问题映射到合适的视觉变换；生成侧缺陷——随着推理深度增加，编辑正确性下降。基于此分析，我们提出ETCHR（编辑以澄清并激发推理），一种条件于问题、具备推理感知的图像编辑器，与下游理解模型解耦，并采用两阶段训练方案针对性解决上述两个缺陷：第一阶段通过监督微调在编辑轨迹上模仿推理，第二阶段通过VLM衍生奖励强化编辑正确性与下游推理准确性。由于编辑器与主模型解耦，ETCHR可无需训练地接入不同开源与闭源MLLM。在五个任务类别（细粒度感知、图表理解、逻辑推理、拼图复原和3D理解）中，ETCHR将Qwen3-VL-8B的Pass@1平均从55.95提升至60.77（+4.82），Gemini-3.1-Flash-Lite从65.08提升至70.55（+5.47），1T参数MoE模型Kimi K2.5从76.55提升至81.16（+4.61）。

summary: Knowledge distillation generally assumes a strong-to-weak relationship where stronger teachers yield better students. In this work, we examine this assumption about distillation in large language model pretraining. By varying architecture sizes and training token budgets, we create strong-to-weak, same-level, and weak-to-strong teacher-student relationships, and study distillation's effectiveness under each. We find that the teacher need not be strong: with proper mixing of the language modeling and knowledge distillation losses, even small and undertrained teachers improve larger students. At the same time, a stronger teacher is not always better: pushing the teacher further, through more parameters or more training tokens, can saturate or even reverse the distillation gains. We further observe that distillation improves generalization (out-of-distribution and downstream performance) more readily than in-domain fitting. Together, these results challenge the common belief that distillation pretraining always requires a strong teacher.
title: Strong Teacher Not Needed? On Distillation in LLM Pretraining
title_translated: 强教师真的必要吗？关于大语言模型预训练中知识蒸馏的再思考
summary_translated: 知识蒸馏通常假设存在强教师到弱学生的关系，即更强的教师能产生更好的学生。本文研究了这一假设在大语言模型预训练中的有效性。通过调整模型架构大小和训练token预算，我们构建了强-弱、同等级以及弱-强的教师-学生关系，并在不同情况下评估蒸馏效果。结果发现，教师并不需要很强：通过合理混合语言建模损失与知识蒸馏损失，即使小型且训练不足的教师也能提升大型学生模型的表现。同时，更强的教师也并非总是更好：过度增加参数或训练token可能导致蒸馏收益饱和甚至逆转。此外，蒸馏更有利于提升泛化能力（如分布外性能和下游任务表现），而非仅在域内拟合。这些结果挑战了‘蒸馏预训练始终需要强教师’的普遍认知。

summary: Keyframe selection is a direct way to provide verifiable visual evidence for long-video question answering (QA). Queries differ in what they require, and finding the right frames depends on knowing what to look for. Existing keyframe selectors either score every frame against a single query, or decompose the query into a fixed schema evaluated by a single visual tool. We propose ToolMerge, a keyframe retrieval method based on decomposition and merging: an Large Language Model (LLM) based planner decomposes the query into tool calls and specifies how their per-tool rankings are merged using boolean operators. To evaluate retrieval directly, we construct Molmo-2 Moments (M2M), a benchmark in which every question is anchored to a specific time interval by construction. Across QA, question retrieval, and caption retrieval, ToolMerge is competitive with prior keyframe selectors, most notably on caption retrieval, outperforming other methods by 5%. Code and data can be found at https://github.com/michalsr/ToolMerge .
title: Decomposing Queries into Tool Calls for Long-Video Keyframe Retrieval
title_translated: 将查询分解为工具调用以实现长视频关键帧检索
summary_translated: 关键帧选择是为长视频问答（QA）提供可验证视觉证据的直接方式。不同查询对内容的需求各异，找到正确帧取决于知道应关注什么。现有关键帧选择方法要么对每个帧单独评分，要么将查询分解为固定模式并由单一视觉工具评估。我们提出ToolMerge，一种基于分解与合并的关键帧检索方法：基于大语言模型（LLM）的规划器将查询分解为工具调用，并指定如何使用布尔运算合并各工具的排名结果。为直接评估检索性能，我们构建了Molmo-2 Moments（M2M）基准，其中每个问题都通过构造锚定于特定时间区间的答案。在问答、问题检索和字幕检索任务中，ToolMerge表现竞争力，尤其在字幕检索上优于其他方法5%。代码与数据可在https://github.com/michalsr/ToolMerge 获取。

summary: Diffusion language models intrinsically fail to capture correlations between decoded tokens, which leads to a harsh trade-off between sampling quality and throughput. To solve this issue, we propose DiLaDiff, a variant of masked diffusion language models with three components: (1) a continuous latent space with semantic capabilities, learned by an auto-encoder fine-tuned from an existing masked diffusion language model; (2) a latent diffusion model learning the prior over the encoder distribution; (3) a consistency model distilling the learned prior into a few-step latent generative model. We show that, even without distillation, our latent-guided diffusion model outperforms the masked diffusion baseline while significantly accelerating inference. Consistency distillation further lowers the computational overhead of continuous diffusion, such that the latent is generated in negligible time compared to discrete decoding.
title: DiLaDiff: Distilled Latent-Augmented Diffusion for Language Modeling
title_translated: DiLaDiff：用于语言建模的蒸馏潜在增强扩散模型
summary_translated: 扩散语言模型固有地无法捕捉解码词元之间的相关性，导致采样质量与吞吐量之间存在严峻权衡。为解决此问题，我们提出DiLaDiff，一种掩码扩散语言模型的变体，包含三个组件：(1) 通过从现有掩码扩散语言模型微调得到的具有语义能力的连续潜在空间；(2) 学习编码器分布先验的潜在扩散模型；(3) 将学习到的先验蒸馏为少步潜在生成模型的一致性模型。我们发现，即使不进行蒸馏，我们的潜在引导扩散模型也优于掩码扩散基线，同时显著加速推理。一致性蒸馏进一步降低了连续扩散的计算开销，使得潜在表示生成时间几乎可忽略，远低于离散解码。

summary: Recently, Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) and Test-Time Scaling (TTS) have advanced LLM code generation through executable verification. Yet Ground-Truth Unit Tests (GT UTs) remain a bottleneck: SOTA RLVR methods require them for costly training, while existing TTS methods lose competitiveness without them. This motivates GT-free TTS, where existing methods directly use self-generated UTs to refine and select code candidates. Yet such UTs are often noisy or spuriously coupled with wrong code, and UT quality in turn cannot be validated without reliable code. The key challenge is therefore to jointly improve both. To this end, we present CoSPlay, a GT-free, training-free framework that jointly improves codes and UTs through cooperative self-play. It first explores diverse solution ideas and identifies their potential failure modes to produce discriminative UT ideas. It then uses bidirectional pass-count signals from the Code-UT execution matrix to iteratively prune or fix weak codes and refresh or replace unreliable UTs, letting the two pools co-evolve. Finally, when multiple codes remain tied at the highest pass count, it picks the final code from the largest output-consensus cluster, since correct codes agree on the same inputs while wrong codes diverge. Experiments on four challenging benchmarks show that CoSPlay on Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct improves average BoN from 22.1% to 33.2% and UT accuracy from 14.6% to 78.3%, matching or surpassing the RLVR model CURE-7B. When applied to CURE-7B, it further improves BoN by 5.7%. CoSPlay also generalizes across diverse backbones and outperforms GT-free TTS baselines under comparable token budgets, with continued gains as the budget scales up. These results suggest a scalable inference strategy for competitive code generation without any GT data.
title: CoSPlay: Cooperative Self-Play at Test-Time with Self-Generated Code and Unit Test
comment: Code is available at: this https URL | Data & log is available at: this https URL
title_translated: CoSPlay：测试时通过自生成代码与单元测试实现协作式自我博弈
summary_translated: 近期，带有可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）和测试时扩展（TTS）通过可执行验证推动了大语言模型代码生成的发展。然而，真实单元测试（GT UTs）仍是瓶颈：最先进的RLVR方法需依赖它们进行昂贵训练，而现有TTS方法在缺乏它们时竞争力下降。这促使了无GT TTS的发展，即直接使用自生成的单元测试来优化和筛选代码候选。但此类测试常噪声大或与错误代码偶然关联，而测试质量又无法在可靠代码基础上验证。核心挑战在于协同提升两者。为此，我们提出CoSPlay，一种无需GT、无需训练的框架，通过协作式自我博弈联合优化代码与单元测试。它首先探索多样解题思路并识别潜在失败模式，生成判别性测试思路；随后利用代码-测试执行矩阵中的双向通过计数信号，迭代地修剪或修复弱代码，刷新或替换不可靠测试，使两池共同演化。最终，当多个代码在最高通过率上并列时，从输出共识最大的聚类中选取最终代码，因为正确代码在相同输入上一致，而错误代码则发散。在四个挑战性基准上的实验表明，CoSPlay在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct上将平均BoN从22.1%提升至33.2%，单元测试准确率从14.6%提升至78.3%，达到或超越RLVR模型CURE-7B。应用于CURE-7B时，BoN进一步提升5.7%。CoSPlay还展现出跨多种骨干网络的泛化能力，在同等token预算下优于其他无GT TTS基线，且随着预算扩大持续获得增益。这些结果表明，无需任何GT数据即可实现可竞争的代码生成，是一种可扩展的推理策略。

summary: While Attention Residuals has shown some effectiveness in addressing the widespread issue of unbounded activation growth across deep residual layers, it inevitably incurs significant communication overhead. To circumvent this bottleneck, we propose Multi-Gate Residuals (MGR), which stabilizes activation scales without additional communication burden. It utilizes a straightforward scoring and gating mechanism to maintain multi-stream context, coupled with Attention Pooling to extract hidden states from the stream states. Empirical experiments demonstrate that MGR is practical for large-scale training and deployment, offering tangible performance improvements over existing architectures.
title: Multi-Gate Residuals
title_translated: 多门残差机制
summary_translated: 尽管注意力残差机制在缓解深层残差层中激活值无界增长方面已显示出一定效果，但不可避免地带来显著通信开销。为克服这一瓶颈，我们提出多门残差（MGR），该机制在不增加通信负担的前提下稳定激活尺度。其采用简单的评分与门控机制维持多流上下文，并结合注意力池化从流状态中提取隐藏状态。实证实验表明，MGR适用于大规模训练与部署，相较于现有架构提供了切实的性能提升。

summary: LLM-based agents for GPU kernel generation are advancing rapidly, yet their progress is fundamentally constrained by the benchmarks they optimize against. Existing benchmarks are poorly aligned with production inference frameworks: they evaluate kernels on a single GPU with synthetic inputs, ignore the surrounding compilation stack, and reward replicating known optimizations rather than discovering new ones. The resulting reward signals are misleading: agents learn to generate kernels that score well in sandboxes but introduce interface incompatibilities, compilation-stack conflicts, and silent correctness degradation when integrated into real systems. We introduce FastKernels, a kernel benchmark built around a minimal set of 46 representative architectures spanning 8 categories, whose kernels collectively subsume those of 96.2% (409/425) of HuggingFace Transformers architectures. FastKernels doubles as a minimalistic, production-grade inference framework that runs at parity with hardened systems such as vLLM and SGLang on mainstream LLM serving and substantially exceeds upstream references on under-served architectures; each task's interface mirrors the corresponding module in the state-of-the-art library for its architecture family, enabling direct deployment of optimized kernels into production codebases. Evaluating state-of-the-art kernel agents on FastKernels, we find that even the strongest agent achieves only 0.94$\times$ aggregate speedup over production baselines, with weaker agents at $0.78\times$ and $0.53\times$ -- confirming that benchmark-production misalignment is a critical bottleneck for the field. We release FastKernels as a stepping stone toward kernel agents whose benchmark gains translate directly into production throughput improvements. Code is available at https://github.com/Snowflake-AI-Research/fastkernels
title: FastKernels: Benchmarking GPU Kernel Generation in Production
title_translated: FastKernels：面向生产环境的GPU内核生成基准测试
summary_translated: 基于大语言模型（LLM）的智能体在GPU内核生成方面快速发展，但其进展受到所优化基准的严重制约。现有基准与生产推理框架对齐不佳：它们仅在单个GPU上使用合成输入评估内核，忽略编译栈的影响，并奖励复制已知优化而非发现新优化。由此产生的奖励信号具有误导性：智能体学习生成在沙盒中表现良好但在实际系统集成时引入接口不兼容、编译栈冲突和无声正确性下降的内核。我们提出FastKernels，一个围绕46个代表性架构（涵盖8个类别）构建的内核基准，其内核共同覆盖了HuggingFace Transformers架构的96.2%（409/425）。FastKernels同时作为轻量级、生产级别的推理框架，在主流LLM服务中性能与vLLM和SGLang等成熟系统相当，并在欠支持架构上显著超越上游参考。每个任务接口均模拟其架构族中最先进库中的对应模块，支持将优化后的内核直接部署到生产代码库。在FastKernels上评估最先进的内核智能体，我们发现即使最强的智能体也仅比生产基线获得0.94倍的整体加速，而较弱智能体分别为0.78倍和0.53倍，证实了基准与生产之间的错位是该领域的一个关键瓶颈。我们发布FastKernels，作为迈向能够将基准提升直接转化为生产吞吐量提升的内核智能体的一步。代码可在https://github.com/Snowflake-AI-Research/fastkernels获取。

summary: Gardening is critical to support well-being, cultural continuity, and food autonomy, yet existing digital tools often provide generic advice that overlooks gardeners' skills, local ecologies, seasons, and cultural contexts. We introduce CultivAgents, a relationship-centered multi-agent system for personalized, socio-culturally grounded gardening support. Grounded in ethics of care, CultivAgents coordinates multiple specialized agents: an Experience Agent that adapts guidance to users' skill levels, an Environmental Agent that grounds advice in local and seasonal conditions, and an Ethnobotanical Agent that connects plants to cultural knowledge and histories. We evaluated CultivAgents through a three-phase mixed-methods study with domain experts (n=3), HCI researchers (n=7), and community gardeners (n=5), analyzing expert feedback, pre/post surveys, and participatory design activities. Results suggest that CultivAgents helped gardeners translate interest into situated action: community gardeners reported increased confidence (3.00 to 3.60), motivation (4.00 to 4.40), and trust in acting on AI advice (3.20 to 4.00). Participants valued hyperlocal ecological guidance and complementary agent perspectives, while also identifying limits in cultural specificity, ecological grounding, and agent coordination. The work advances relationship-centered AI, offering design implications for multi-agent systems that support food sovereignty, community resilience, and cultural preservation.
title: CultivAgents: Cultivating Relationship-Centered Multi-Agent Systems for Personalized Gardening
comment: Preprint, 9 pages. Website: this https URL
title_translated: CultivAgents：面向个性化园艺的关系中心型多智能体系统
summary_translated: 园艺对促进福祉、文化延续和食物自主至关重要，但现有数字工具常提供通用建议，忽视园丁技能、本地生态、季节变化和文化背景。我们提出CultivAgents，一种以关系为中心的多智能体系统，用于提供个性化、社会文化根基的园艺支持。该系统基于关怀伦理，协调多个专业智能体：经验智能体根据用户技能水平调整指导；环境智能体将建议扎根于本地和季节条件；民族植物学智能体将植物与文化知识和历史相连接。我们通过三阶段混合方法研究对领域专家（n=3）、人机交互研究人员（n=7）和社区园丁（n=5）进行了评估，分析专家反馈、前后问卷及参与式设计活动。结果表明，CultivAgents帮助园丁将兴趣转化为具体行动：社区园丁报告自信心（3.00→3.60）、动机（4.00→4.40）和对AI建议的信任度（3.20→4.00）均有所提升。参与者重视超本地生态指导和互补的智能体视角，但也指出在文化特异性、生态基础和智能体协调方面的局限。本工作推进了以关系为中心的人工智能，为支持食物主权、社区韧性和文化保存的多智能体系统提供了设计启示。

summary: Proprietary large language models (LLMs) face risks of intellectual property (IP) violation, as adversaries can replicate an LLM by collecting input-output pairs to train a surrogate model, causing financial setbacks. Watermarks offer a promising defense to verify ownership, but existing methods often struggle with semantic distortion, factual inconsistency, and adversarial attacks. In addition, key-conditioned watermarks for provider-specific detection, especially in cross-provider and multi-user scenarios, remain largely underexplored. To address these challenges, we propose SAFESEAL, a novel key-conditioned watermarking framework that achieves strong detectability with minimal impact on model utility, effectively balancing detectability, utility, and robustness. SAFESEAL preserves named entities while substituting linguistic terms with context-aware synonyms through a key-conditioned Tournament sampling mechanism, maintaining semantic fidelity and factual consistency. For detection, we introduce a key-conditioned contrastive detector that jointly encodes the text and key, enabling provider-specific and robust watermark verification. We derive theoretical bounds on the utility-detectability trade-off and significantly reduce latency through lightweight models, batching, and parallelism. Extensive experiments show that SAFESEAL outperforms baselines in utility, detectability, and robustness, achieving a BERTScore of 0.983, entity similarity of 0.963, a 98.2% detection rate, and the highest human ratings for text quality and content preservation, with latency comparable to the fastest baseline. To promote transparency and community-driven progress, we release the first public watermark leaderboard and an interactive demo.
title: Robust LLM Watermarking with Minimal Semantic Distortion for IP Protection
title_translated: 面向知识产权保护的鲁棒LLM水印技术：最小语义失真
summary_translated: 专有大型语言模型（LLM）面临知识产权（IP）侵犯风险，攻击者可通过收集输入输出对训练替代模型进行复制，造成财务损失。水印技术为验证所有权提供了有前景的防御手段，但现有方法常存在语义失真、事实不一致和对抗攻击问题。此外，针对特定提供商检测的关键条件水印，尤其在跨提供商和多用户场景下，仍基本未被充分探索。为应对这些挑战，我们提出SAFESEAL，一种新型关键条件水印框架，实现强可检测性的同时对模型实用性影响极小，有效平衡了可检测性、实用性与鲁棒性。SAFESEAL通过关键条件锦标赛采样机制，在保留命名实体的前提下，用上下文感知同义词替换语言项，保持语义保真度和事实一致性。在检测方面，我们引入关键条件对比检测器，联合编码文本与密钥，实现特定提供商且鲁棒的水印验证。我们推导出实用-可检测性权衡的理论边界，并通过轻量模型、批处理和并行化显著降低延迟。大量实验表明，SAFESEAL在实用性、可检测性和鲁棒性方面均优于基线，达到BERTScore 0.983、实体相似度0.963、98.2%的检测率，以及最高的人类评分文本质量和内容保留度，延迟与最快基线相当。为促进透明度和社区驱动进步，我们发布了首个公开水印排行榜和交互式演示。

summary: Autonomous robotic exploration of unknown and hazardous environments, a long-standing challenge, can be significantly improved by leveraging the advanced reasoning of Vision-Language Models (VLMs). We introduce a novel exploration pipeline where a VLM performs high-level strategic decision-making, guiding a conventional low-level robotics control stack. At decision points, the robot generates a multimodal prompt with its current map and visual imagery of potential paths, or frontiers. The VLM analyzes this prompt to select the most promising frontier, replacing simple geometric heuristics with contextual spatial reasoning. This approach, validated in simulation across six indoor environments, improves map coverage by up to 24\% over existing methods. Our pipeline is lightweight, training-free, and easily transferable to any robot with standard sensors and an internet connection.
title: Autonomous Frontier-Based Exploration with VLM Guidance
comment: 8 pages, 10 figures, CVPR 2026: 2nd Workshop on 3D-LLM/VLA: Bridging Language, Vision and Action in 3D Environments
title_translated: 基于视觉-语言模型引导的自主前沿探索
summary_translated: 自主机器人在未知且危险环境中的探索是一个长期挑战，可通过利用视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的先进推理能力显著改善。我们提出一种新颖的探索流程，其中VLM执行高层次战略决策，指导传统的低层次机器人控制堆栈。在决策点，机器人生成包含当前地图和潜在路径（即前沿）视觉图像的多模态提示，VLM分析该提示以选择最具前景的前沿，用情境化空间推理取代简单的几何启发式方法。该方法在六个室内环境的仿真中得到验证，相比现有方法，地图覆盖率最高提升24%。我们的流程轻量、无需训练，且可轻松迁移至配备标准传感器和互联网连接的任何机器人。

summary: The deployment of large language models (LLMs) on resource-constrained devices remains challenging, spurring interest in split inference, where models are partitioned between client and server to reduce computational burden and enhance privacy by transmitting only intermediate activations. However, the privacy-preserving capabilities of split inference, particularly in the context of LLMs, have not been exhaustively investigated. To fill this gap, we introduce ActInv, which solves an intermediate activation matching problem to reconstruct the client's input. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that ActInv achieves high-fidelity reconstructions, even in the presence of common perturbation-based defenses such as Gaussian noise injection and activation sparsification. To systematically understand this vulnerability, we develop Perturbation Amplification Factor (PAF), a metric for quantifying a layer's inherent resistance to reconstruction. Our analysis reveals that privacy vulnerability is not uniform across layers, with some layers being highly susceptible to leakage while others offer natural resistance. Furthermore, we demonstrate that defense effectiveness can be significantly improved by calibrating perturbation directions to maximize reconstruction error during backpropagation. Building on these insights, we design PriPert and conduct comprehensive evaluations, covering privacy, utility, and computational overhead, to demonstrate its effectiveness.
title: What Does the Server See? Understanding Privacy Leakage from Large Language Models in Split Inference
comment: Accepted to ACM CCS'26
title_translated: 服务器看到了什么？理解大语言模型分层推理中的隐私泄露
summary_translated: 在资源受限设备上部署大语言模型（LLM）仍具挑战性，推动了分层推理的发展——将模型在客户端与服务器之间分割，以减轻计算负担并提高隐私性，仅传输中间激活值。然而，分层推理在LLM背景下的隐私保护能力尚未得到充分研究。为填补这一空白，我们提出ActInv，通过解决中间激活匹配问题来重建客户端输入。大量评估表明，ActInv即使在面对高斯噪声注入和激活稀疏化等常见扰动防御时，也能实现高保真重建。为系统理解此漏洞，我们开发了扰动放大因子（PAF），用于量化各层对重建的内在抗性。分析显示，隐私脆弱性并非在各层均匀分布，某些层极易泄露，而其他层则具备天然抵抗力。此外，我们证明通过校准扰动方向以最大化反向传播过程中的重建误差，可显著提升防御效果。基于这些洞察，我们设计了PriPert，并进行全面评估，涵盖隐私性、实用性与计算开销，以证明其有效性。

summary: Mixture-of-Experts Large Language Models (MoE-LLMs) achieve strong performance but incur substantial memory overhead due to massive expert parameters. Mixed-precision quantization mitigates this cost by allocating expert-wise bit-widths based on their importance, approaching the accuracy-memory Pareto frontier and enabling extreme low-bit quantization. However, existing methods rely on layer-wise importance estimation and overlook router shifts induced by quantization, resulting in suboptimal allocation and routing. In this work, we propose Global Expert-level Mixed-precision Quantization (GEMQ) to overcome these limitations via (1) a global linear-programming formulation that captures model-wide expert importance based on quantization error analysis, and (2) efficient router fine-tuning to adapt routing to quantized experts. These components are integrated into a progressive quantization framework that iteratively refines importance estimation and allocation. Experiments demonstrate that GEMQ significantly reduces memory and accelerates inference with minimal accuracy degradation. Source code is available at https://github.com/jndeng/GEMQ .
title: GEMQ: Global Expert-Level Mixed-Precision Quantization for MoE LLMs
comment: ICML 2026
title_translated: GEMQ：面向MoE大语言模型的全局专家级混合精度量化
summary_translated: 混合专家大语言模型（MoE-LLMs）虽性能强大，但因大量专家参数导致显著的内存开销。混合精度量化通过根据专家重要性分配不同的位宽来缓解这一问题，接近准确率-内存帕累托前沿，并支持极端低比特量化。然而，现有方法依赖逐层重要性估计，忽略了量化引起的路由器变化，导致分配和路由不理想。本文提出全局专家级混合精度量化（GEMQ），通过（1）基于量化误差分析的全局线性规划公式捕捉模型范围内的专家重要性，以及（2）高效的路由器微调以适应量化后的专家。这两个组件被整合进一个渐进式量化框架中，迭代优化重要性估计与分配。实验表明，GEMQ在极小精度损失下显著降低内存占用并加速推理。源代码见 https://github.com/jndeng/GEMQ。

summary: ModeSwitch-LLM is a lightweight request-boundary controller for improving single-GPU large language model inference efficiency by routing each request to an appropriate fixed inference mode. Instead of relying on one static serving configuration, the system selects among FP16, quantized modes, speculative decoding, and hybrid modes such as GPTQ plus prefix caching and INT8 plus continuous batching using cheap workload-level features. We evaluate ModeSwitch-LLM on Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct served on a single NVIDIA A100 GPU. On deployment-style synthetic workloads, the online controller achieves a 2.10x mean latency speedup over FP16 and a 0.48x mean energy ratio, corresponding to 51.7% lower energy per token. On automatic benchmarks used as a quality gate, accuracy remains close to FP16 with a mean delta of +0.17 percentage points. We also evaluate lightweight learned routers, but find that they do not clearly outperform the rule-based controller because they add routing overhead and more often select modes that violate quality, energy, or memory constraints. These results show that simple request-aware routing can recover substantial efficiency from existing inference modes without retraining the model or changing its architecture.
title: ModeSwitch-LLM: A Lightweight Phase-Aware Controller for Cross-Mode LLM Inference on a Single GPU
comment: 10 pages main text, 11 pages including references, 5 figures, 3 tables. Preprint
title_translated: ModeSwitch-LLM：单GPU上跨模式大语言模型推理的轻量级阶段感知控制器
summary_translated: ModeSwitch-LLM是一种轻量级请求边界控制器，通过将每个请求路由到合适的固定推理模式，提升单GPU大语言模型推理效率。系统不依赖单一静态服务配置，而是利用低成本的工作负载级特征，在FP16、量化模式、推测解码及混合模式（如GPTQ加前缀缓存、INT8加连续批处理）之间进行选择。我们在单个NVIDIA A100 GPU上部署Meta-Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct进行评估。在部署风格合成工作负载下，在线控制器相比FP16实现2.10倍平均延迟加速和0.48倍平均能耗比，即每token能耗降低51.7%。在自动基准测试（作为质量门控）中，准确率接近FP16，平均偏差仅为+0.17个百分点。我们还评估了轻量级学习型路由器，但发现其并未明显优于基于规则的控制器，因其引入了额外的路由开销，且更常选择违反质量、能耗或内存约束的模式。结果表明，简单的请求感知路由即可在不重训练模型或改变架构的前提下，从现有推理模式中恢复大量效率。

summary: Frontier language models sometimes recognize that they are being evaluated and adjust their behavior, undermining validity of benchmark results. Yet the field studies it without a shared foundation, conflating properties of the evaluation with properties of the model, and detection with behavioral response. We ground evaluation awareness in social psychology, decomposing it into an environment component (how recognizable the task is) and a model component that separates recognition from propensity to act on it. We operationalize the environment component through eight categorized trigger factors, such as placeholder entities and grading-style output formats, and study recognition and behavior through chain-of-thought monitoring. Across nine frontier models and four benchmarks, recognition rates depend on the specific pairing of model and benchmark rather than on either in isolation. Recognition rarely leads to behavioral change, and when it does, the direction depends on the type of evaluation perceived. Models are also more sensitive to safety than capability evaluations, placing safety benchmark validity at greater risk. To study which factors each model is sensitive to and how they interact, we propose \textbf{EvalAwareBench}, a factor-controlled benchmark of 100 paired safety-capability tasks where each of the eight factors can be independently toggled, varying evaluative signals while holding the underlying request fixed. Through EvalAwareBench, we find that no single factor uniformly affects all models, but stacking factors progressively raises evaluation awareness across all of them. Our framework and EvalAwareBench provide the tools to measure, attribute, and mitigate evaluation awareness, pointing to behavioral consistency under recognition as a promising path forward.
title: Decomposing and Measuring Evaluation Awareness
title_translated: 分解与测量评估意识
summary_translated: 前沿语言模型有时会意识到自己正在被评估，并据此调整行为，从而破坏基准测试结果的有效性。然而，该领域尚未建立统一基础，常将评估特性与模型特性混淆，将检测与行为反应混为一谈。本文基于社会心理学对评估意识进行界定，将其分解为环境成分（任务可识别性）和模型成分（识别与行动倾向的分离）。我们通过八类分类触发因素（如占位符实体、评分式输出格式）操作化环境成分，并通过思维链监控研究识别与行为表现。在九个前沿模型和四个基准上的研究表明，识别率取决于模型与基准的具体组合，而非单独因素。识别很少引发行为改变，即使发生，方向也取决于所感知的评估类型。模型对安全评估比能力评估更敏感，因此安全基准的有效性面临更大风险。为研究各模型对哪些因素敏感及其交互方式，我们提出 	extbf{EvalAwareBench}，一个包含100对安全-能力任务的因子控制基准，其中八个因素可独立切换，保持底层请求不变而改变评估信号。通过EvalAwareBench，我们发现没有单一因素能统一影响所有模型，但叠加多个因素会逐步提升所有模型的评估意识。我们的框架与EvalAwareBench为测量、归因和缓解评估意识提供了工具，指出在识别状态下保持行为一致性是一条有前景的前进路径。

summary: Machine learning methods rely on data. However, gathering suitable data can be challenging due to availability constraints, cost, or the need for domain expertise. Expanding datasets with additional sources is a common response to limited data, yet this practice does not always improve downstream performance and can sometimes lead to a loss of performance, known as negative transfer. We propose RADAR, a simple, geometrically grounded metric for estimating cross-domain transferability in foundation models. RADAR analyzes the layer-wise evolution of representations by measuring angular alignments and relative changes in distance along layer-to-layer displacement trajectories, and by comparing empirical distributions of within-domain and cross-domain dynamics. We hypothesize that domain transferability is related to the divergence between these trajectory distributions. We evaluate the metric across multiple modalities, including cross-lingual sentiment classification with text embedding models and cross-domain image classification with foundation vision models. Across several settings, RADAR provides competitive predictive performance relative to existing transferability metrics on several vision and text benchmarks, with particularly strong results when domain transitions are smooth or cleanly separated. Our ablations further suggest that the effectiveness of transferability estimation depends on the geometry of the model's internal representation space, with different modalities favoring different topological formulations.
title: RADAR: Relative Angular Divergence Across Representations
comment: 27 pages; 8 figures; 10 tables
title_translated: RADAR：表示间相对角度发散
summary_translated: 机器学习方法依赖数据，但获取合适数据常受可用性、成本或领域专业知识限制。扩展数据集以增加来源是应对数据不足的常见做法，但此做法并不总能提升下游性能，甚至可能导致性能下降，即负迁移现象。我们提出RADAR，一种简单且几何基础的度量方法，用于估计基础模型的跨域迁移能力。RADAR通过分析表示在各层间的演化过程，测量层间位移轨迹中的角度对齐与距离相对变化，并比较同域与跨域动态的经验分布。我们假设域间迁移能力与这些轨迹分布之间的发散程度相关。我们在多种模态上评估该度量，包括使用文本嵌入模型的跨语言情感分类，以及使用基础视觉模型的跨域图像分类。在多个设置中，RADAR在多个视觉与文本基准上表现出与现有迁移能力度量相当的预测性能，尤其在域间转换平滑或清晰分离时表现突出。消融实验进一步表明，迁移能力估计的有效性取决于模型内部表示空间的几何结构，不同模态偏好不同的拓扑表述。

summary: Large language models now write software, draft legal documents, and produce clinical notes, yet fundamental limits, from Turing and Arrow to the No Free Lunch theorems, shape what computation can do. This thesis turns such impossibility results from curiosities into design rules. Its flagship result proves an accuracy ceiling set by architecture alone: past a critical reasoning depth, no amount of training moves it, at any adapter rank, sample size, or loss function. Computable before deployment from layer count and embedding width, this Deterministic Horizon is measured between nineteen and thirty-one across twelve transformer architectures, and fine-tuning on optimal-length traces recovers under four percentage points. The mechanism is a capacity invariant of the residual stream, and an information-theoretic conversion yields super-exponential accuracy decay past the horizon. An unconditional circuit-complexity lower bound for modular exponentiation against constant-depth prime-modulus circuits complements this result. The same argument recasts across subfields: preference learning under any misspecified model jumps discontinuously in sample complexity; multi-stage retrieval pipelines require at least as many independent metrics as stages; standard truthful auctions fail for agents with prompt-dependent valuations; and zero-knowledge verification of neural inference pays a measured overhead of one hundred ten to one hundred ninety times per non-linear activation. Together these form a catalogue of sixteen specifications, each pairing a computable boundary, a quantified violation cost, and a constructive design rule: two compositions are proved, one pairing is an honest obstruction, and four remain open. The impossibility-specification methodology is offered for the generative research programme that trustworthy AI may need. Every fundamental limit of AI is also a design rule.
title: The Deterministic Horizon: Impossibility Results as Design Specifications for Trustworthy AI Systems
comment: PhD thesis, Department of Computer Science, The University of Hong Kong, 2026. 271 pages, 18 figures, 15 tables, 5 algorithms
title_translated: 确定性极限：不可行性结果作为可信AI系统的设设计规范
summary_translated: 大型语言模型如今已能编写软件、起草法律文件并生成临床记录，但根本性限制——从图灵和阿罗定理到无免费午餐定理——决定了计算的边界。本文将这些不可行性结果从奇观转变为设计规则。其核心成果证明，仅由架构决定的准确率上限存在：一旦推理深度超过临界值，无论适配器秩、样本量或损失函数如何，训练都无法突破该上限。该确定性极限可在部署前通过层数与嵌入宽度计算得出，覆盖十二种Transformer架构，数值介于19至31之间；在最优长度轨迹上微调仅能恢复低于4个百分点的性能。其机制源于残差流的容量不变性，信息论转换揭示越过极限后准确率呈超指数衰减。此外，针对常数深度素数模电路的模幂运算，给出了无条件电路复杂性下界。同一论证框架还可延伸至其他子领域：任何误设模型下的偏好学习在样本复杂性上出现不连续跳跃；多阶段检索流水线至少需要与阶段数相等的独立指标；标准诚实拍卖对提示依赖型估值的代理失效；零知识验证神经推理需为每个非线性激活付出110至190倍的开销。这些共同构成十六项设计规范，每项均包含可计算边界、量化违规代价与建设性设计规则：已证明两个组合，一个为诚实障碍，四个仍待解决。该不可行性-规范方法论为可信AI可能需要的生成性研究计划提供支持。AI的每一个根本性限制，同时也是设计规则。

summary: Large language models can answer questions about textbooks, lecture notes, and programming exercises more reliably when their answers are grounded in an explicit knowledge source. Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a common approach: relevant fragments of a document are retrieved and inserted into the model context before answering. For mathematical and technical material, the original LaTeX source can be a better starting point than a PDF, because it contains structural information, labels, sectioning commands, macros, and authorial intent that are often lost or distorted in PDF extraction. However, LaTeX source is not automatically AI-friendly. Cross-references must be resolved, custom macros must be interpreted, exercises and examples must be identified, and author-supplied semantic metadata may be needed. This article describes a focused preprocessing approach for turning LaTeX source, together with its compiled auxiliary files and optional author annotations, into Markdown and JSONL chunks suitable for indexing in a vector database.
title: AI-Friendly LaTeX: Using LaTeX Code as a Knowledge Source for Retrieval-Augmented Generation
comment: 19 pages, 3 figures
title_translated: AI友好的LaTeX：将LaTeX代码作为检索增强生成的知识源
summary_translated: 大型语言模型在回答教科书、讲义和编程练习问题时，若其答案基于明确的知识源，则表现更为可靠。检索增强生成（RAG）是一种常见方法：在回答前，从文档中检索相关片段并插入模型上下文。对于数学和技术内容而言，原始LaTeX源文件比PDF更适合作为起点，因为其包含结构信息、标签、章节命令、宏以及作者意图等，在PDF提取过程中常被丢失或扭曲。然而，LaTeX源文件并非天然对AI友好。需要解决交叉引用、解释自定义宏、识别练习与示例，并可能需要作者提供的语义元数据。本文描述了一种聚焦的预处理方法，将LaTeX源文件及其编译的辅助文件和可选的作者注释，转化为适合向量数据库索引的Markdown和JSONL块。

summary: Self-evolving agents should not train on examples they cannot justify. Data-free self-evolving search agents offer a scalable route to systems that generate their own questions, answer them, and improve from their own feedback without human annotations. Yet, without verifiable evidence, this loop can reward fluent but unsupported examples, turning the self-generated curriculum into an opaque and potentially unreliable training signal. We argue that evidence verifiability is a prerequisite for trustworthy self-evolution in search agents: each generated instance should include not only an answer but also a source-grounded span whose contribution to that answer can be measured. We introduce EVE-Agent, an Evidence-Verifiable Self-Evolving Agent that operationalizes this principle through a modification to the proposer--solver framework. The proposer generates a question, an answer, and a verbatim evidence span. An evidence verifier then rewards the span according to the marginal accuracy gain when the evidence is provided. This produces a training signal that favors evidence that genuinely helps answer the question, without requiring oracle answers, human labels, or external annotations. EVE-Agent leaves the backbone model, retriever, search tool, and optimization framework unchanged. Experiments show that EVE-Agent substantially improves evidence-grounded correctness over prior self-evolving search agents. The resulting curriculum is not merely self-generated but auditable by construction: each training example carries an inspectable source span that explains why it should be trusted.
title: EVE-Agent: Evidence-Verifiable Self-Evolving Agents
comment: 23 pages, 2 figures
title_translated: EVE-Agent：可验证证据的自我演化智能体
summary_translated: 自我演化智能体不应在无法证明其合理性的例子上进行训练。无数据的自我演化搜索智能体提供了一条可扩展路径，使系统能够自动生成问题、自行解答，并通过自身反馈不断改进，而无需人工标注。然而，若缺乏可验证的证据，这一循环可能奖励流利但无支持的例子，导致自生成课程成为不透明且潜在不可靠的训练信号。我们认为，证据可验证性是可信自我演化在搜索智能体中的先决条件：每个生成实例不仅应包含答案，还应包含一个基于来源的文本片段，其对答案的贡献可被量化衡量。我们提出了EVE-Agent，一种可验证证据的自我演化智能体，通过修改提议者-求解器框架来实现该原则。提议者生成一个问题、一个答案和一段原文证据。随后，证据验证器根据提供证据后带来的边际准确率提升来奖励该片段。这产生了一个训练信号，偏好真正有助于回答问题的证据，且无需Oracle答案、人工标签或外部注释。EVE-Agent保持了基础模型、检索器、搜索工具和优化框架不变。实验表明，EVE-Agent显著提升了相对于先前自我演化搜索智能体的证据支撑正确性。由此产生的课程不仅是自生成的，而且从构建上就具备可审计性：每个训练样本都携带一个可检查的来源片段，解释为何应信任它。

summary: Benchmark accuracy is often implicitly assumed to reflect grounded visual understanding in vision-language models (VLMs), yet it remains unclear to what extent such scores truly reflect reliance on visual evidence. Motivated by a surprising observation that removing a substantial fraction of image tokens only degrades model performance very slightly on a widely used hallucination benchmark, we systematically investigate this mismatch in a set of open-source VLMs. Our analysis spans multiple levels of granularity, spanning global visual degradation, localized occlusion, question reformulation, answer-space expansion, and decision-level analyses beyond standard accuracy. We further complement these behavioral results with a layer-wise analysis of vision-token geometry. Throughout the experiments, we find that although VLMs do incorporate visual input, their predictions are less sensitive to the loss of fine-grained visual evidence that standard accuracy should have suggested. Even when the final prediction remains unchanged, the model's internal support for the correct answer may already be weakened. We further complement a representation-level analysis, which shows increasing similarity among visual tokens in deeper layers, providing a possible explanation for our findings. Together, these results suggest that current benchmarks are not sufficient to reliably evaluate fine-grained visual grounding in VLMs.
title: Seeing without Looking: Do Vision-Language Benchmarks Really Test Vision?
comment: Accepted to GRAIL-V: Grounded Retrieval and Agentic Intelligence for Vision-Language, CVPR 2026 Workshop. accepted version
title_translated: 无需观察：视觉-语言基准测试真的在检验视觉能力吗？
summary_translated: 基准测试准确率通常被隐含地认为反映了视觉-语言模型（VLMs）的具身视觉理解，但这些分数在多大程度上真正反映模型对视觉证据的依赖仍不清楚。受一个令人惊讶的观察启发——即移除大量图像标记后，模型在广泛使用的幻觉基准上的性能仅轻微下降——我们系统地研究了若干开源VLMs中的这种不匹配现象。我们的分析涵盖多个粒度层次，包括全局视觉退化、局部遮挡、问题重述、答案空间扩展以及超越标准准确率的决策层面分析。我们进一步结合层间视觉标记几何结构的分析，以补充行为结果。在整个实验中，我们发现尽管VLMs确实利用了视觉输入，但其预测对细粒度视觉证据的丧失并不敏感，这与标准准确率所预期的情况不符。即使最终预测未变，模型对正确答案的内部支持可能已减弱。我们进一步进行了表示层面的分析，发现深层中视觉标记之间的相似性逐渐增加，为我们的发现提供了可能解释。综合来看，这些结果表明当前基准不足以可靠评估VLMs中的细粒度视觉具身性。

summary: Generative Vision-Language Models (VLMs) perform well on multimodal reasoning, but how visual inputs are transformed to text remains poorly understood. Existing interpretability work on VLMs uses Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs), which decompose static residual representations and miss the functional updates that drive cross-modal interaction. We adopt a function-centric framework based on Transcoders, sparse approximations of MLP sublayers that act as a causal proxy for layer-wise computation. Applied to Gemma 3-4B-IT, the framework decomposes the model into interpretable computational pathways linking image patches to directions in token generation. Transcoder attributions produce stronger and more stable effects on visually grounded tokens under patch ablation than SAE attributions, and align better with semantically relevant image regions. A False Visual Grounding counterfactual analysis confirms that the recovered pathways are specific to vision-language interaction.Finally, we perform a structural analysis of hallucinated generations, by extracting graph-based indicators from circuit traces produced by the transcoders. A logistic classifier over these mechanistic graph features predicts hallucinations at AUC $0.68$. These results show that function-centric circuit decomposition yields interpretable and predictive accounts of multimodal computation in VLMs.
title: Transcoders Trace Visual Grounding and Hallucinations in Vision-Language Models
title_translated: Transcoders揭示视觉具身性与幻觉在视觉-语言模型中的表现
summary_translated: 生成式视觉-语言模型（VLMs）在多模态推理方面表现良好，但视觉输入如何转化为文本仍理解不足。现有的VLM可解释性研究使用稀疏自编码器（SAEs），它们分解静态残差表示，却忽略了驱动跨模态交互的功能性更新。我们采用一种以功能为中心的框架，基于Transcoders——MLP子层的稀疏近似，作为逐层计算的因果代理。应用于Gemma 3-4B-IT模型时，该框架将模型分解为可解释的计算路径，连接图像块与文本生成方向。与SAE归因相比，Transcoder归因在图像块消融下对视觉具身性标记产生更强且更稳定的效应，并与语义相关的图像区域对齐更好。虚假视觉具身性反事实分析确认，恢复的路径特异性地对应于视觉-语言交互。最后，我们通过对Transcoder生成的电路轨迹进行结构分析，提取图基指标，用于分析幻觉生成。基于这些机制性图特征的逻辑分类器在幻觉预测上达到AUC 0.68。这些结果表明，以功能为中心的电路分解能提供对VLMs多模态计算过程的可解释且可预测的解释。

summary: Formal mathematics libraries are rapidly expanding, creating a growing need to refactor verified proofs for maintainability and to improve training data quality for neural provers. However, scalable proof optimization is hindered by heterogeneous and heuristically specified objectives, scarce data, and high training and inference costs. To overcome these challenges, we introduce ImProver 2, a neurosymbolic framework for automated proof optimization in Lean 4. ImProver 2 combines a data-efficient expert-iteration pipeline with a scaffold that exposes formal structure alongside lightweight informal abstractions. We further introduce a suite of metrics capturing structural proof properties. Using ImProver 2, we train a 7B-parameter model that outperforms orders-of-magnitude larger models within the same model family, and is competitive with mid-tier frontier models across metrics. We additionally demonstrate that our neurosymbolic scaffold significantly improves performance across both small and frontier models. We show that with proper scaffolding and training, small models can effectively restructure research-level proofs over complex and varied metrics, matching substantially larger systems and establishing proof optimization as a scalable, learnable task.
title: ImProver 2: Iteratively Self-Improving LMs for Neurosymbolic Proof Optimization
title_translated: ImProver 2：用于神经符号证明优化的迭代自我改进语言模型
summary_translated: 形式数学库正在迅速扩展，催生了对已验证证明进行重构以提高可维护性，以及改善神经证明器训练数据质量的需求。然而，可扩展的证明优化受到异构且启发式设定的目标、数据稀缺以及高昂的训练和推理成本的阻碍。为克服这些挑战，我们引入ImProver 2，一种用于Lean 4中自动化证明优化的神经符号框架。ImProver 2结合了数据高效的专家迭代流程与一种暴露正式结构的同时融入轻量级非形式抽象的支架。我们还引入了一套捕捉证明结构属性的度量。使用ImProver 2，我们训练了一个70亿参数的模型，其性能远超同模型家族中规模大数个数量级的模型，并在各项指标上与中等水平的前沿模型相当。此外，我们证明了我们的神经符号支架显著提升了小型和前沿模型的性能。我们展示了在适当的支架和训练下，小型模型能够有效重构复杂多样的研究级证明，匹配显著更大的系统，确立了证明优化是一项可扩展、可学习的任务。

summary: The exponential growth of global academic output has confronted researchers and AI agents with an unprecedented ``information explosion,'' where fragmented and unstructured knowledge organization impedes deep interdisciplinary integration. Current academic retrieval tools predominantly rely on superficial keyword matching or vector-space semantic retrieval, which lack the topological reasoning capabilities required to navigate complex logical connections. Agentic deep-research-based frameworks are often prone to logical hallucinations and consuming high inference costs. To bridge this gap, in this report, we introduce SciAtlas, a large-scale, multi-disciplinary, heterogeneous academic resource knowledge graph designed as a panoramic scientific evolution network. By integrating over 43M papers from 26 disciplines, and a total of 157M entities and 3B triplets, SciAtlas provides a structured topological cognitive substrate that dismantles disciplinary barriers and furnishes AI agents with a global perspective.
